projects.title: Student Volunteer for IASFM 2025
projects.description: International Association for the Study of Forced Migration Conference 2025. Translated for panels. In particular, SMK's was about the role of literary works in displacement issues. Interviewed and documented international panelists and attendees, gaining insight into global forced displacement issues
